title: onosma subulifolia
intro: Onosma subulifolia, also known as the fingered onosma, is a type of flowering plant in the family Apocynaceae. This plant has been traditionally used in folk medicine for its medicinal properties, including its anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties. The health benefits of Onosma subulifolia include its potential to reduce fever, alleviate respiratory issues, and act as an antiseptic. Onosma subulifolia can be prepared as a herbal tea, infusion, or tincture, allowing for various forms of consumption.
